message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[String Theory and the Donaldson Polynomial]
  #v(1em)
  Source-backed arXiv sample
  #v(1em)
])

#block(inset: (x: 2em))[
  #text(weight: "bold")[Abstract]
  #v(0.5em)
  It is shown that the scattering of spacetime axions with fivebrane solitons of heterotic string theory at zero momentum is proportional to the Donaldson polynomial.
]

= References And Citations <sec:refs>

This sample cites source keys [teinep] and [STR.55]. Section #link(<sec:refs>)[1] and Equation #link(<eq:source-demo>)[1] provide cross-reference coverage.

$ a^2 + b^2 = c^2 $ <eq:source-demo>

#v(2em)
#text(weight: "bold")[References]
#v(1em)
